name: beyondcompare-mcp
description: Modern MCP server for Beyond Compare file and directory comparison with multimedia drive scanning capabilities
long_description: A comprehensive MCP server that provides powerful file and directory comparison using Beyond Compare, along with advanced multimedia drive scanning for inventory management. Features include file comparison, folder synchronization, duplicate detection, and USB drive monitoring.

beyond_compare_path.title: Beyond Compare Executable
beyond_compare_path.description: Select your Beyond Compare installation (BCompare.exe on Windows, bcompare on macOS/Linux)

scripts_directory.title: Scripts Directory
scripts_directory.description: Directory for temporary Beyond Compare script files

log_level.title: Log Level
log_level.description: Logging level for the MCP server

tools.name: compare_files
tools.description: Compare two files using Beyond Compare and get detailed comparison results

tools.name: compare_folders
tools.description: Compare two folders using Beyond Compare with optional subfolder inclusion

tools.name: sync_folders
tools.description: Synchronize folders using Beyond Compare with multiple sync modes (mirror, update, backup)

tools.name: multimedia_drive_scanner
tools.description: Scan multimedia drives (E:, F:, K:, L:) for complete inventory with filtering options

tools.name: find_multimedia_duplicates
tools.description: Find duplicate multimedia files across drives using content hashing

tools.name: detect_usb_drives
tools.description: Detect and list all connected USB drives with detailed information

tools.name: backup_dev_repositories
tools.description: Smart backup of development repositories with intelligent filtering and compression

tools.name: analyze_dev_workspace
tools.description: Comprehensive analysis of development workspace including languages, dependencies, and optimization opportunities

tools.name: scan_repo_health
tools.description: Scan repository health and identify potential issues with automated fix options

tools.name: cleanup_dev_artifacts
tools.description: Clean up build artifacts and temporary files across repositories to reclaim disk space

tools.name: find_duplicate_code
tools.description: Find duplicate code across repositories for refactoring opportunities

tools.name: compare_workspace_snapshots
tools.description: Compare workspace snapshots to identify changes over time

tools.name: selective_restore
tools.description: Selectively restore specific projects or files from backup with flexible filtering
